THEAPPRENTICE-APPRENTICE_STRIKE.title: Strike
THEAPPRENTICE-APPRENTICE_DEFEND.title: Defend
THEAPPRENTICE-PLAN.title: Plan
THEAPPRENTICE-PLAN.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} card. Choose up to 2 cards in your hand. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to them.
THEAPPRENTICE-PLAN+.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} card. Choose up to 2 cards in your hand. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to them.
THEAPPRENTICE-PLAN.selectionPrompt: Choose up to 2 cards to make Planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-JUST_AS_PLANNED.title: Just as Planned
THEAPPRENTICE-JUST_AS_PLANNED.descriptio: [gold]Retain[/gold]. Play all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards in the order they were planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-JUST_AS_PLANNED+.descripti: [gold]Retain[/gold]. [gold]Innate[/gold]. Play all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards in the order they were planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-SCRAP_PLANS.title: Scrap Plans
THEAPPRENTICE-SCRAP_PLANS.description: Discard all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards in your hand. Draw 1 per card discarded.
THEAPPRENTICE-SCRAP_PLANS+.description: Discard all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards in your hand. Draw 1 per card discarded.
THEAPPRENTICE-CONTEMPLATE.title: Contemplate
THEAPPRENTICE-CONTEMPLATE.description: Gain {Block:diff()} block. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to a card in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-CONTEMPLATE+.description: Gain {Block:diff()} block. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to a card in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-CONTEMPLATE.selectionPromp: Choose a card to make Planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-REALIZE.title: Realize
THEAPPRENTICE-REALIZE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to a card in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-REALIZE+.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to a card in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-REALIZE.selectionPrompt: Choose a card to make Planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-EPIPHANY.title: Epiphany
THEAPPRENTICE-EPIPHANY.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} card. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to a card in your hand. [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-EPIPHANY+.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} card. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to a card in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-EPIPHANY.selectionPrompt: Choose a card to make Planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-GROOVE.title: Groove
THEAPPRENTICE-GROOVE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Planned[/gold] card you have.
THEAPPRENTICE-GROOVE+.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Planned[/gold] card you have.
THEAPPRENTICE-OVERTHINKING.title: Overthinking
THEAPPRENTICE-OVERTHINKING.description: Gain {Block:diff()} block for each [gold]Planned[/gold] card you have.
THEAPPRENTICE-OVERTHINKING+.description: Gain {Block:diff()} block for each [gold]Planned[/gold] card you have.
THEAPPRENTICE-CREATIVE_BLOCK.title: Creative Block
THEAPPRENTICE-CREATIVE_BLOCK.description: Gain {Block:diff()} block. If you have no [gold]Planned[/gold] cards, gain {Block:diff()} additional block.
THEAPPRENTICE-CREATIVE_BLOCK+.descriptio: Gain {Block:diff()} block. If you have no [gold]Planned[/gold] cards, gain {Block:diff()} additional block.
THEAPPRENTICE-REHEARSAL.title: Rehearsal
THEAPPRENTICE-REHEARSAL.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Choose up to 2 cards in your hand to apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to.
THEAPPRENTICE-REHEARSAL+.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Choose up to 3 cards in your hand to apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to.
THEAPPRENTICE-CLEAR_MIND.title: Clear Mind
THEAPPRENTICE-TABULA_RASA.title: Tabula Rasa
THEAPPRENTICE-TABULA_RASA+.description: Remove [gold]Planned[/gold] from all cards. Draw 1 card.
THEAPPRENTICE-TRANSPOSE.title: Transpose
THEAPPRENTICE-TRANSPOSE.description: Remove [gold]Planned[/gold] from a card. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to another.
THEAPPRENTICE-TRANSPOSE+.description: Remove [gold]Planned[/gold] from a card. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to another. Draw 1 card.
THEAPPRENTICE-TRANSPOSE.selectionPrompt1: Choose a Planned card to un-plan.
THEAPPRENTICE-TRANSPOSE.selectionPrompt2: Choose a card to make Planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-SIGNATURE.title: Signature
THEAPPRENTICE-PRELUDE.title: Prelude
THEAPPRENTICE-PRELUDE.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Starts each combat [gold]Planned[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-PRELUDE+.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Starts each combat [gold]Planned[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-METHOD_TO_THE_MADNESS.desc: At the start of each turn, apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to a random card in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-METHOD_TO_THE_MADNESS+.des: At the start of each turn, choose a card in your hand to apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to.
THEAPPRENTICE-METHOD_TO_THE_MADNESS.sele: Choose a card to make Planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-IN_THE_ZONE.title: In the Zone
THEAPPRENTICE-IN_THE_ZONE.description: At the start of each turn, if you have [gold]Planned[/gold] cards, gain {Energy:diff()} Energy.
THEAPPRENTICE-IN_THE_ZONE+.description: At the start of each turn, if you have [gold]Planned[/gold] cards, gain {Energy:diff()} Energy.
THEAPPRENTICE-OBSESSION.title: Obsession
THEAPPRENTICE-OBSESSION.description: At the end of each turn, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] per [gold]Planned[/gold] card.
THEAPPRENTICE-OBSESSION+.description: At the end of each turn, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] per [gold]Planned[/gold] card.
THEAPPRENTICE-ENCORE.title: Encore
THEAPPRENTICE-ENCORE.description: Execute all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards. They keep their [gold]Planned[/gold] status.
THEAPPRENTICE-ENCORE+.description: Execute all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards. They keep their [gold]Planned[/gold] status.
THEAPPRENTICE-VIRTUOSO.title: Virtuoso
THEAPPRENTICE-MAGNUM_OPUS.title: Magnum Opus
THEAPPRENTICE-MAGNUM_OPUS.description: Choose up to {Cards:diff()} cards from your draw pile. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to them.
THEAPPRENTICE-MAGNUM_OPUS+.description: Choose up to {Cards:diff()} cards from your draw pile. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to them.
THEAPPRENTICE-MAGNUM_OPUS.selectionPromp: Choose cards from your draw pile to make Planned.
